error_signature: 401 error when trying to retrieve the user
title: 401 Error Fetching User Record from Xano
symptom: When attempting to retrieve a user record using Xano, a 401 error is returned. This indicates an authentication issue with the request.
not_this_if: The auth token is correctly bound to the request
root_cause: The 401 error occurs because the request is not sending the expected access token. Instead of sending just the token, the request is sending an object that contains the token, which Xano cannot process correctly.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the Xano integration
Ensure that the auth token is bound directly to the token value, not the object containing it
Retry the request to fetch the user record
agent_instruction: Bind the auth token directly to its value in the Xano integration settings.
